001package edu.cnm.deepdive.pippiphooray.viewmodel;
002
003import android.app.Activity;
004import androidx.lifecycle.LiveData;
005import androidx.lifecycle.MutableLiveData;
006import androidx.lifecycle.ViewModel;
007import com.google.android.libraries.identity.googleid.GoogleIdTokenCredential;
008import dagger.hilt.android.lifecycle.HiltViewModel;
009import edu.cnm.deepdive.pippiphooray.service.repository.GoogleAuthRepository;
010import java.util.concurrent.CompletableFuture;
011import javax.inject.Inject;
012
013/**
014 * ViewModel for managing Google authentication and user sign-in/sign-out operations.
015 */
016@HiltViewModel
017public class SignInViewModel extends ViewModel {
018
019  private final GoogleAuthRepository repository;
020  private final MutableLiveData<GoogleIdTokenCredential> credential;
021  private final MutableLiveData<Throwable> throwable;
022
023  /**
024   * Constructs a SignInViewModel with the specified authentication repository.
025   *
026   * @param repository the repository for Google authentication operations
027   */
028  @Inject
029  public SignInViewModel(GoogleAuthRepository repository) {
030    this.repository = repository;
031    credential = new MutableLiveData<>();
032    throwable = new MutableLiveData<>();
033  }
034
035  /**
036   * Gets the current user credential as LiveData.
037   *
038   * @return a LiveData containing the Google ID token credential, or null if not signed in
039   */
040  public LiveData<GoogleIdTokenCredential> getCredential() {
041    return credential;
042  }
043
044  /**
045   * Gets any errors from authentication operations as LiveData.
046   *
047   * @return a LiveData containing any throwable exceptions from auth operations
048   */
049  public LiveData<Throwable> getThrowable() {
050    return throwable;
051  }
052
053  /**
054   * Attempts to sign in quickly using cached credentials.
055   *
056   * @param activity the activity context for the sign-in operation
057   */
058  public void signInQuickly(Activity activity) {
059    throwable.setValue(null);
060    CompletableFuture<?> future = repository.signInQuickly(activity);
061    handleFuture(future);
062  }
063
064  /**
065   * Initiates a sign-in flow with user interaction.
066   *
067   * @param activity the activity context for the sign-in operation
068   */
069  public void signIn(Activity activity) {
070    throwable.setValue(null);
071    CompletableFuture<?> future = repository.signIn(activity);
072    handleFuture(future);
073  }
074
075  /**
076   * Signs out the current user.
077   */
078  public void signOut() {
079    throwable.setValue(null);
080    repository
081        .signOut()
082        .thenRun(() -> credential.postValue(null))
083        .exceptionally((t) -> {
084          throwable.postValue(t);
085          return null;
086        });
087  }
088
089  /**
090   * Handles the completion of an authentication future operation.
091   *
092   * @param future the CompletableFuture from an auth operation
093   */
094  @SuppressWarnings("unchecked")
095  private void handleFuture(CompletableFuture<?> future) {
096    ((CompletableFuture<GoogleIdTokenCredential>) future)
097        .thenAccept(credential::postValue)
098        .exceptionally((t) -> {
099          throwable.postValue(t);
100          credential.postValue(null);
101          return null;
102        });
103  }
104
105}
